creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 211783
update of port to 7.6.0

Update of port was requested in mailinglist
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-elastic/2020-February/000516.html

It was simple update of version number and distinfo.

Attached patch and poudriere testport log.

Not tested in production environment run, so please somebody test it before commit.
